success.description: Light flares from your fingertips, impossibly bright, washing away color and detail from all but your allies. During the next round, ignore all initiative tokens except for 1 hero token
As above, but up to 3 hero tokens

boon.description: Allies within medium range recover 1 stress and 1 fatigue

chaosStar.description: You fall into a time warp of your own. You skip your turn during the next round, but you also ignore all actions and other effects during the next round -it's as if you don't exist!

sigmarsComet.description: Allies within medium range add to their actions during the time warp
